periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 2am, then showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 60. South southwest wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%.
